title: andryala glandulosa
intro: Andryala glandulosa, also known as the glandular Andryala, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Andryala glandulosa is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture form or as a dried extract.
